name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-mcs-policy-agent-cea
title: Policy Agent (Custom Engine Agent with Salesforce escalation) for Copilot Studio
shortDescription: A Custom Engine Agent in Copilot Studio that answers policy questions from SharePoint and escalates detailed clause-level requests to Salesforce via an Agent Flow.
longDescription: A Custom Engine Agent built in Microsoft Copilot Studio that handles summary-level policy questions against SharePoint, and seamlessly escalates detailed clause-level requests to Salesforce through an Agent Flow — no channel switch for the user.
